steps.title: Find the subject and number
steps.content: The subject of the blank is “lost works like Lucan’s poem praising Emperor Nero, Laudes Neronis.” The phrase between dashes interrupts the sentence but does not change the plural subject “works.” The verb must be plural.

steps.title: Eliminate singular forms
steps.content: Choice B, “is becoming,” is singular. Choice C, “has become,” is singular. Choice D, “becomes,” is singular. The plural verb phrase agrees with “lost works” and fits the present result of becoming known through references. The answer is A.
